plugin_desc: EfficientIP SOLIDserver DDI SNMP baseline child template for network-service devices under EfficientIP PEN 2440. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm DDI appliance SNMP capability and hardware or service OID subtrees, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan, PSU or DNS-DHCP service-health scalar semantics, so private hardware and service subtrees are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
